message:
feat: add Tokio drift checker guardrail (bd-1now.3.1)

Implement a deterministic static guardrail that prevents ambient Tokio/runtime
reintroduction in frankenengine-node. The checker scans source files and
Cargo.toml for banned patterns including #[tokio::main], runtime builders,
and direct tokio imports.

Key features:
- Structured exception mechanism via TOKIO_DRIFT_EXCEPTION(bd-XXXX) markers
  requiring bead reference and justification for legitimate future relaxation
- String literal detection to avoid self-referential false positives
- Test context detection (skips #[cfg(test)] modules)
- Cargo.toml dependency scanning (production deps flagged, dev-deps with
  runtime features flagged)
- Human-readable report output with file:line references
- 20 unit tests covering: exception validation, source scanning, Cargo.toml
  parsing, string literal handling, synthetic crate integration, and a
  real-crate regression test

Note: Full cargo test execution blocked by upstream frankenengine-engine
compile errors in react_jsx_lowering.rs (separate project). Code verified
via rustfmt and manual review.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
